title: gamolepis leiocarpa
intro: Gamolepis leiocarpa, also known as the 'tree senna', is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Gamolepis leiocarpa are attributed to its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and laxative properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to treat constipation, diarrhea, and intestinal worms, as well as its use in traditional medicine to reduce inflammation and pain. Gamolepis leiocarpa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and its seeds are dried and crushed to create a powder for medicinal use.
